channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: skernelx/tavily-key-generator
item.description: Auto batch register Tavily API Keys with pluggable email backends

item.title: pasky/chrome-cdp-skill
item.description: Give your AI agent access to your live Chrome session — works out of the box, connects to tabs you already have open

item.title: uditgoenka/autoresearch
item.description: Claude Autoresearch Skill — Autonomous goal-directed iteration for Claude Code. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch. Modify → Verify → Keep/Discard → Repeat forever.

item.title: jalonsogo/tui-studio
item.description: Visual design tool for building Terminal User Interfaces

item.title: moltlaunch/cashclaw
item.description: An autonomous agent that takes work, does work, gets paid, and gets better at it.

item.title: Narcooo/inkos
item.description: Multi-agent novel production system — AI agents autonomously write, audit, and revise novels with human review gates

item.title: greyhaven-ai/autocontext
item.description: (no description)

item.title: voidzero-dev/vite-plus
item.description: Vite+ is the unified toolchain and entry point for web development. It manages your runtime, package manager, and frontend toolchain in one place.

item.title: upper-up/meta-lobbying-and-other-findings
item.description: (no description)

item.title: NawfalMotii79/PLFM_RADAR
item.description: Open-source, low-cost 10.5 GHz PLFM phased array RADAR system

item.title: onecli/onecli
item.description: Open-source credential vault, give your AI agents access to services without exposing keys.

item.title: TianyiDataScience/openclaw-control-center
item.description: (no description)

item.title: garrytan/gstack
item.description: Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 6 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Eng Manager, Release Manager and QA Engineer

item.title: davebcn87/pi-autoresearch
item.description: Autonomous experiment loop extension for pi

item.title: manuelschipper/nah
item.description: Context-aware safety guard for Claude Code. A permission system you control.

item.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: paperclipai/paperclip
item.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies

item.title: chrisworsey55/atlas-gic
item.description: ATLAS by General Intelligence Capital — Self-improving AI trading agents using Karpathy-style autoresearch

item.title: gsd-build/gsd-2
item.description: A powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system that enables agents to work for long periods of time autonomously without losing track of the big picture

item.title: zubair-trabzada/geo-seo-claude
item.description: GEO-first SEO skill for Claude Code. Comprehensive AI search optimization for any website — citability scoring, AI crawler analysis, brand authority, schema markup, platform-specific optimization, and PDF reports. If you want learn how to sell this to real businesses, check out the skool community

item.title: alibaba/page-agent
item.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

item.title: photon-hq/qclaw-wechat-client
item.description: Reverse-engineered TypeScript client for QClaw's WeChat Access API.

item.title: jundot/omlx
item.description: LLM inference server with continuous batching & SSD caching for Apple Silicon — managed from the macOS menu bar

item.title: FreedomIntelligence/OpenClaw-Medical-Skills
item.description: The largest open-source medical AI skills library for OpenClaw🦞.

item.title: ParthJadhav/app-store-screenshots
item.description: end to end app store screenshot creation using AI

item.title: karpathy/agenthub
item.description: GitHub is for humans. AgentHub is for agents. First use case is for autoresearch but it's a lot more general than that. Exploratory project.

item.title: andrewyng/context-hub
item.description: (no description)

item.title: HKUDS/CLI-Anything
item.description: CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native

item.title: code-yeongyu/oh-my-openagent
item.description: omo; the best agent harness - previously oh-my-opencode

item.title: pbakaus/impeccable
item.description: The design language that makes your AI harness better at design.

item.title: BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker
item.description: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

item.title: nikopueringer/CorridorKey
item.description: Perfect Green Screen Keys

item.title: miolini/autoresearch-macos
item.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically adopted for MacOS

item.title: vulhunt-re/vulhunt
item.description: Vulnerability detection framework by Binarly's REsearch team

item.title: karpathy/autoresearch
item.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically

item.title: cyxzdev/Uncodixfy
item.description: the holly uncodexify instructions - letting GPT create uncodexified UI

item.title: steipete/discrawl
item.description: cli for discord with sqlite backend

item.title: c0m4r/kula
item.description: Lightweight, self-contained Linux® server monitoring tool

item.title: viperrcrypto/Siftly
item.description: Local Twitter/X bookmark organizer with AI categorization and mindmap visualization

item.title: Minecraft-Community-Edition/client
item.description: Whispers LCE Client
